ddls:
CREATE TABLE "poker_hands" (
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of poker hand */,
  "hand_name" TEXT /* Name of the poker hand */,
  "payout_1" INTEGER /* Payout for betting 1 credit */,
  "payout_2" INTEGER /* Payout for betting 2 credits */,
  "payout_3" INTEGER /* Payout for betting 3 credits */,
  "payout_4" INTEGER /* Payout for betting 4 credits */,
  "payout_5" INTEGER /* Payout for betting 5 credits */,
  "hand_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the poker hand */,
  "hand_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the hand */,
  "hand_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the hand (1-5) */,
  "hand_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity metric of the hand among players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for player login */,
  "credit_balance" INTEGER /* Current credit balance of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player account status (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  "kyc_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the player's identity has been verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "credits_bet" INTEGER /* Number of credits bet during the session */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poker hand won in the session */,
  "payout_received" INTEGER /* Payout received for the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (active, completed, abandoned) */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session was played */,
  "session_device" TEXT /* Device used to play the session */,
  "session_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the player during the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES poker_hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_method" TEXT /* Method of transaction (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  "transaction_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "money_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of money to be exchanged */,
  "credit_amount" INTEGER /* Equivalent amount of credits */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange rate becomes valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange rate expires */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus */,
  "bonus_name" TEXT /* Name of the bonus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bonus */,
  "credit_value" INTEGER /* Value of the bonus in credits */,
  "bonus_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions for receiving the bonus */,
  "bonus_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the bonus expires */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., cash, credits) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bonus received */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the bonus */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date when the bonus was received */,
  "bonus_status" TEXT /* Status of the bonus (active, redeemed, expired) */,
  "bonus_claimed_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the bonus claimed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id", "player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poker hand */,
  "total_played" INTEGER /* Total number of times the hand has been played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins for the hand */,
  "average_bet" REAL /* Average number of credits bet on the hand */,
  "total_payout" INTEGER /* Total payout for the hand */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of sessions for the hand */,
  "most_played_location" TEXT /* Most common location where the hand is played */,
  "most_common_device" TEXT /* Most common device used to play the hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES poker_hands ("hand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., login, logout, transaction) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the player during the event */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used during the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who submitted the review */,
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poker hand reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the player */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* Admin who reviewed the feedback */,
  "reviewed_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_hand_id FOREIGN KEY ("hand_id") REFERENCES poker_hands ("hand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system administrator */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for administrator login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the admin account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
